lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਭਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee gur paaeaa bhaaee har har naam dhiaae |3|
lines.english: By great good fortune, I found the Guru, O Siblings of Destiny, and I meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਦਾ ਹੈ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਭਾਈ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਾਚੇ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach sadaa hai niramalaa bhaaee niramal saache soe |
lines.english: The Truth is forever pure, O Siblings of Destiny; those who are true are pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਮਧੇ ਜਨੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਭਾਈ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਕੋਈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: kott madhe jan paaeeai bhaaee viralaa koee koe |
lines.english: Among millions, O Siblings of Destiny, hardly one humble servant of the Lord is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਣੀ ਭਾਈ ਤਿਸੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: nadar kare jis aapanee bhaaee tis paraapat hoe |
lines.english: When the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace, O Siblings of Destiny, then one obtains Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਦੁਤੁਕੇ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 dutuke |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, Dho-Thukay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਤਾ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਭਾਈ ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak rataa sach naam bhaaee sun man tan niramal hoe |4|2|
lines.english: Nanak is imbued with the True Name, O Siblings of Destiny; hearing it, the mind and body become immaculately pure. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਲਉ ਭਾਉ ਅਭਾਉ ਇਹੁ ਮਾਨੈ ਤਉ ਲਉ ਮਿਲਣੁ ਦੂਰਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jau lau bhaau abhaau ihu maanai tau lau milan dooraaee |
lines.english: As long as this person believes in love and hate, it is difficult for him to meet the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਆਪਨਾ ਕਰਤ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ਤਉ ਲਉ ਬੀਚੁ ਬਿਖਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aan aapanaa karat beechaaraa tau lau beech bikhaaee |1|
lines.english: As long as he discriminates between himself and others, he will distance himself from the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਧਵੇ ਐਸੀ ਦੇਹੁ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: maadhave aisee dehu bujhaaee |
lines.english: O Lord, grant me such understanding,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਉ ਸਾਧ ਗਹਉ ਓਟ ਚਰਨਾ ਨਹ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਮੁਹਤੁ ਚਸਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sevau saadh ghau ott charanaa neh bisarai muhat chasaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: that I might serve the Holy Saints, and seek the protection of their feet, and not forget them, for a moment, even an instant. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੁਗਧ ਅਚੇਤ ਚੰਚਲ ਚਿਤ ਤੁਮ ਐਸੀ ਰਿਦੈ ਨ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: re man mugadh achet chanchal chit tum aisee ridai na aaee |
lines.english: O foolish, thoughtless and fickle mind, such understanding did not come into your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਨਪਤਿ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਆਨ ਤੂ ਰਚਿਆ ਉਰਝਿਓ ਸੰਗਿ ਬੈਰਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: praanapat tiaag aan too rachiaa urajhio sang bairaaee |2|
lines.english: Renouncing the Lord of Life, you have become engrossed in other things, and you are involved with your enemies. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਕਾ ਬਕਨਾ ਇਉ ਜਾਨਉ ਜੈਸੇ ਪਵਨੁ ਝੁਲਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saakat kaa bakanaa iau jaanau jaise pavan jhulaaee |3|
lines.english: Know that the babbling of the faithless cynic is like wind passing by. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਗੁ ਨ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਥਾਪੈ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sog na biaapai aap na thaapai saadhasangat budh paaee |
lines.english: Sorrow does not afflict one who does not harbor self-conceit; in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I have attained this understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਪਰਾਧ ਅਛਾਦਿਓ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kott paraadh achhaadio ihu man kahanaa kachhoo na jaaee |
lines.english: This mind is inundated by millions of sins - what can I say?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਲੋਕ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਮਾਇਆ ਸਨਬੰਧੇਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: putr kalatr lok grih banitaa maaeaa sanabandhehee |
lines.english: Children, spouses, men and women in one's household, are all bound by Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੀਨ ਸਰਨਿ ਆਇਓ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਭੁ ਲੇਖਾ ਰਖਹੁ ਉਠਾਈ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: jan naanak deen saran aaeo prabh sabh lekhaa rakhahu utthaaee |4|3|
lines.english: Nanak, Your humble servant has come to Your Sanctuary, God; please, erase all his accounts. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਨਰ ਕਾਹੇ ਪਪੋਰਹੁ ਦੇਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: re nar kaahe paporahu dehee |
lines.english: O man, why do you pamper your body so?

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤ ਕੀ ਬਾਰ ਕੋ ਖਰਾ ਨ ਹੋਸੀ ਸਭ ਮਿਥਿਆ ਅਸਨੇਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ant kee baar ko kharaa na hosee sabh mithiaa asanehee |1|
lines.english: At the very last moment, none of them shall stand by you; their love is totally false. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਡਿ ਜਾਇਗੋ ਧੂਮੁ ਬਾਦਰੋ ਇਕੁ ਭਾਜਹੁ ਰਾਮੁ ਸਨੇਹੀ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aoodd jaaeigo dhoom baadaro ik bhaajahu raam sanehee | rahaau |
lines.english: It shall disperse like a cloud of smoke; vibrate upon the One, the Beloved Lord. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨਿ ਸੰਙਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਹੀ ਕੀਨੀ ਜਲ ਕੂਕਰ ਭਸਮੇਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: teen sangiaa kar dehee keenee jal kookar bhasamehee |
lines.english: There are three ways in which the body can be consumed - it can be thrown into water, given to the dogs, or cremated to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਆਮਰੋ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮਹਿ ਬੈਠਾ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਬਿਸਰੋਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hoe aamaro grih meh baitthaa karan kaaran bisarohee |2|
lines.english: He considers himself to be immortal; he sits in his home, and forgets the Lord, the Cause of causes. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਭਾਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਮਣੀਏ ਸਾਜੇ ਕਾਚੈ ਤਾਗਿ ਪਰੋਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: anik bhaat kar manee saaje kaachai taag parohee |
lines.english: In various ways, the Lord has fashioned the beads, and strung them on a slender thread.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਤੁਮ ਸਿਰਜੇ ਸਿਰਜਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਨੇਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jin tum siraje siraj savaare tis dhiaavahu din rainehee |
lines.english: He created you, and after creating you, He adorned you - meditate on Him day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂਟਿ ਜਾਇਗੋ ਸੂਤੁ ਬਾਪੁਰੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਾਛੈ ਪਛੁਤੋਹੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: toott jaaeigo soot baapure fir paachhai pachhutohee |3|
lines.english: The thread shall break, O wretched man, and then, you shall repent and regret. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਮੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਓਟ ਗਹੇਹੀ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: jan naanak prabh kirapaa dhaaree mai satigur ott gahehee |4|4|
lines.english: God has showered His Mercy upon servant Nanak; I hold tight to the Support of the True Guru. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪਹੁਚਨਹਾਰਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕਾ ਭਰਵਾਸਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: koe na pahuchanahaaraa doojaa apune saahib kaa bharavaasaa |1|
lines.english: No one else can equal me, because I have the loving support of my Lord and Master. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਮਨਹਿ ਭਇਆ ਪਰਗਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa bhettio vaddabhaagee maneh bheaa paragaasaa |
lines.english: I met the True Guru, by great good fortune, and my mind has been enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੁਨੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: apune satigur kai balihaarai |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਛੈ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜਾ ਘਰਿ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਹਮਾਰੈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aagai sukh paachhai sukh sahajaa ghar aanand hamaarai | rahaau |
lines.english: I am at peace in this world, and I shall be in celestial peace in the next; my home is filled with bliss. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰਾ ਸੋਈ ਖਸਮੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: antarajaamee karanaihaaraa soee khasam hamaaraa |
lines.english: He is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, the Creator, my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਭਏ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗੇ ਇਕ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਆਧਾਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: nirbhau bhe gur charanee laage ik raam naam aadhaaraa |2|
lines.english: I have become fearless, attached to the Guru's feet; I take the Support of the Name of the One Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹੈ ਭੀ ਹੋਵਨਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: safal darasan akaal moorat prabh hai bhee hovanahaaraa |
lines.english: Fruitful is the Blessed Vision of His Darshan; the Form of God is deathless; He is and shall always be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਠਿ ਲਗਾਇ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਜਨ ਰਾਖੇ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kantth lagaae apune jan raakhe apunee preet piaaraa |3|
lines.english: He hugs His humble servants close, and protects and preserves them; their love for Him is sweet to Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਅਚਰਜ ਸੋਭਾ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਆਇਆ ਰਾਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: vaddee vaddiaaee acharaj sobhaa kaaraj aaeaa raase |
lines.english: Great is His glorious greatness, and wondrous is His magnificence; through Him, all affairs are resolved.
